seed.welcome1Body: Use code WELCOME for 25% off your first order
seed.welcome2Body: Order now and enjoy free delivery on all your orders

available.title: Available Orders

empty.title: No available orders
empty.body: New orders from customers will appear here

available.acceptError: Could not accept order — it may have been taken
available.offlineSub: You will not receive new orders
available.offlineBody: Turn on availability to receive nearby orders
available.errorBody: Check your connection and try again

noActive.title: No active order
noActive.body: Accept an available order to start delivering

deliverConfirm.title: Confirm Delivery
deliverConfirm.body: Are you sure the order has been delivered to the customer?

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel Order
cancelConfirm.body: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? It will go back to searching for another courier.
cancelConfirm.errorMsg: Could not cancel the order. Please try again.

availabilityToggle.errorMsg: Could not change your availability. Check your connection and try again.

orderRequest.title: Write Your Order
orderRequest.label: Order Details
orderRequest.hint: Example: I want a cola and chicken shawarma from Al-Shater Hassan
orderRequest.placeholder: Write what you want to order in detail...
steps: Your order is sent to nearby couriers
A courier accepts and goes to get your order
A chat opens to coordinate details with them
orderRequest.noAddressBody: Please add a delivery address before placing your order.

paymentInfo.title: Payment Methods
paymentInfo.heroSub: The only payment method available in Zaboni right now
paymentInfo.infoBanner: Electronic payment or credit cards are not accepted at this time.

steps.title: Place Your Order
steps.desc: Write what you want from the restaurant and add your delivery address.

steps.title: Courier Picks Up & Delivers
steps.desc: The courier picks up your order from the restaurant and heads to you directly.

steps.title: Pay Cash on Delivery
steps.desc: No card needed. Just have the cash ready and hand it to the courier upon arrival.

tips: Have the exact amount ready to speed up the delivery process.
Enter your address accurately to ensure the courier reaches you.
You can chat with the courier through the in-app chat.

cancelOrder.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
cancelOrder.cancelledNote: Your order has been cancelled. You can place a new order at any time.
cancelOrder.cancelledNoteExpired: No courier was found within 30 minutes. Please try again.
cancelOrder.cancelledNoteAdmin: Your order was cancelled by the administration.
cancelOrder.cannotCancelNote: Cannot cancel after courier acceptance — chat with the courier instead
cancelOrder.alreadyAcceptedBody: A courier has already accepted your order and it can no longer be cancelled

searching.title: Looking for a courier near you
searching.sub: You'll get a notification when a courier accepts
searching.subAfterCourierCancel: Courier cancelled — searching for another courier

statusSteps.on_way: Courier is on the way to you

hero.title: We're here to help
hero.sub: Our team is available 7 days a week to assist you with any issue

items.q: How do I cancel my order?
items.a: You can cancel your order before a courier accepts it from the order tracking screen.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Once a courier accepts your order, you can track them live from the order tracking screen.
We currently accept cash on delivery only.

linkError.title: Could not open link
linkError.body: The app was unable to open this link. You can copy the contact info and reach out manually.

description.title: About Zaboni
description.body: Zaboni is a fast delivery app connecting you with the best restaurants in Homs. Order from our wide selection of restaurants and get your food delivered to your door quickly.

courierApply.title: Apply as a Courier
courierApply.subtitle: Fill in the details below and we'll review your application
courierApply.successMsg: Your application will be reviewed by the team and you'll be notified soon.
courierApply.errorMsg: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
courierApply.validationName: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters)

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.successMessage: Your profile has been updated successfully
editProfile.permissionMessage: We need access to your photo library to change your profile picture

slides.title: Order Anything
slides.body: Write your order freely — from any restaurant, with any details you want.

slides.title: A Courier Comes to You
slides.body: Your order is sent to nearby couriers and one accepts within seconds.

slides.title: Pay on Delivery
slides.body: 100% cash — no credit cards, no subscriptions. Just hand the money to the courier.
